title: Burst of Joy
description: An explosion of warm hues capturing the pure feeling of joy. Thick impasto technique with palette knife textures.

title: Garden Dream
description: Lush blooms rendered in rich oil paint, layered with glazes to achieve luminous depth and botanical beauty.

title: Golden Hour
description: The magic of late afternoon light across an open landscape — warm gold, long shadows, and peaceful stillness.

title: Ocean Mind
description: Layers of blue, teal and white evoke the calming, ever-moving nature of the ocean — introspective and vast.

title: Quiet Grace
description: A contemplative portrait study exploring light and shadow on form — intimate, warm, and timeless.

title: Wild Bloom
description: Loose, expressive watercolour florals — spontaneous brushwork that celebrates the wildness of nature in bloom.
